claims.claim: ReplayFence is usable from a normal OpenClaw TUI prompt, not a bespoke custom agent.
claims.user_action: Watch the narrated skill demo or inspect the raw TUI typescript and session tool calls.
claims.visible_result: The recorded OpenClaw TUI session shows a short user-style prompt typed inline, reads the installed replayfence SKILL.md, runs the demo command with exec, runs verify with exec, reads the capsule, then returns CONSUMED, REPLAY_REJECTED, VERIFIED, and ReplayFence check complete.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: demo/openclaw-tui-interactive.typescript, demo/openclaw-tui-interactive-session-events.json, and .hunter/openclaw-tui-interactive.report.json record the typed prompt, skill read, exec calls, capsule read, and generated artifacts.
claims.test: npm run record:openclaw-tui generated a 1920x1200 MP4 and TUI report with toolSummary.calls=4 and failures=0.

claims.claim: The local capsule verifier re-derives deterministic action and latch fields.
claims.user_action: Load the local capsule and click Verify.
claims.visible_result: The verification report shows schema, canonical hash, latch key, and replay rejected checks passing.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: demo/openclaw-tui-replayfence-capsule.json, demo/openclaw-tui-demo-output.json, and demo/openclaw-tui-verify-output.json store the same checks for the TUI-created run.
claims.test: npm run replayfence:verify and npx playwright test tests/onboard.spec.ts passed.

claims.claim: OnceLatchRegistry is deployed on Pharos Atlantic.
claims.user_action: Read the registry metadata and open the deploy report.
claims.visible_result: The deployed registry address is shown as 0xf3cb65898bc692495c64e2fa3981acbab2770a73.
claims.test: npm run contract:compile passed and PharosScan tx link is recorded.

claims.claim: The first live consume succeeds on Pharos.
claims.user_action: Click Fence + Execute Once in the evidence workbench.
claims.visible_result: The first consume tx hash is shown with receiptStatus success and a PharosScan link.
claims.test: npx playwright test tests/runtime-interaction.spec.ts passed across Chromium, Firefox, WebKit, and Pixel 7.

claims.claim: The exact replay is rejected by the same Pharos latch.
claims.user_action: Click Replay Same Action after the first consume is revealed.
claims.visible_result: The UI shows REPLAY_REJECTED, the same latch key, and a reverted replay transaction link.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: demo/pharos-consume-report.json replayAttempt.transaction.receiptStatus is reverted and eth_call decodes ReplayFenceReplay.
claims.test: npx playwright test tests/runtime-interaction.spec.ts passed with reload and second-context checks.

claims.claim: A guest can save and reopen proof history without login.
claims.user_action: Complete the Try flow, open Inspect saved capsule, and reload the page.
claims.visible_result: The capsule history list remains visible and includes guest-owned records plus seeded evidence.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: tests/runtime-interaction.spec.ts asserts reload persistence through replayfence.capsule.history.v1 localStorage records.
claims.test: npx playwright test tests/runtime-interaction.spec.ts passed across Chromium, Firefox, WebKit, and mobile Chromium.

claims.claim: A second browser context can verify the exported Pharos report.
claims.user_action: Paste the exported Pharos report from a separate browser context and click Verify.
claims.visible_result: The verifier reports Pharos consume report verification and decoded custom error.
